titulo: Course Stories — Approval and Rejection Flow
descricao: Receives course story approval or rejection via webhook. On rejection, regenerates the image with updated data via Placid and resends it for approval by email.
problema: The story review and correction process was disorganized, with manual back-and-forth between the design team and managers.
resultado: A structured approval flow with automatic regeneration on rejection.
metrica: Automated approval cycle with instant regeneration
destaques: Background upload via Google Drive to a public URL
Approval email with preview grouped by unit
